scenarios.description: parse(html, baseUri) with non-empty HTML and non-empty baseUri returns a Document with correct title
scenarios.expectedResult: Document whose title() equals the HTML <title> content and baseUri() equals the provided baseUri
pseudocode: TEST TC01 parse html with title

scenarios.description: parse(html, baseUri) with empty HTML yields an empty document with given baseUri
scenarios.expectedResult: Document with empty body.html() and baseUri() equals the provided baseUri

scenarios.description: parse(html, baseUri) with HTML missing head/title yields document with empty title
scenarios.expectedResult: Document whose title() returns empty string
pseudocode: TEST TC03 parse html without title

scenarios.description: parse(html, parser) with custom parser delegates to parser.parseInput
scenarios.precondition: Parser stub provided that records inputs and returns a dummy Document
scenarios.expectedResult: Returned Document is the dummy Document from stub parser
pseudocode: TEST TC04 parse with custom parser

Parser parser = new Parser(){ public Document parseInput(String h, String b){ record(h,b); return new Document(""); }}; String html = "

one

";
assert lastRecordedHtml.equals(html); assert lastRecordedBaseUri.equals(""); assert doc != null;

scenarios.description: parse(html) default no baseUri delegates to Parser.parse(html,"")
scenarios.expectedResult: Document with baseUri() equal to empty string

scenarios.description: parse(html, baseUri, parser) with null html throws IllegalArgumentException
pseudocode: String html = null; String baseUri = "https://a/"; Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser();

scenarios.description: parse(html, baseUri, parser) with null parser throws IllegalArgumentException
pseudocode:
String html = "

"; String baseUri = ""; Parser parser = null;

scenarios.description: parse(html, baseUri, parser) with UTF-8 special chars maintains text
scenarios.expectedResult: Document body.text() equals original including emoji
pseudocode:
String html = "

😊

"; String baseUri = "url"; Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser();

scenarios.description: parse(html, parser) with HTML containing relative URLs uses empty baseUri
scenarios.expectedResult: Elements with hrefs resolved against empty baseUri yield absoluteUrl()==""
pseudocode: String html = "link"; Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser();

scenarios.description: parse(html) with null html throws IllegalArgumentException
